Patch Set 5:

Chris, I pushed https://review.whamcloud.com/55890 to fix a bug in test_30b related to the fake NID generation, and then noticed this patch is conflicting.  I updated my patch and it should now also properly handle fake IPv6 NID generation without having to special-case these NIDs.

parents.subject: LU-18019 tests: Convert hostname to IP list

commit.subject: LU-18013 tests: Update conf-sanity 30b for large NIDs
commit.message:
LU-18013 tests: Update conf-sanity 30b for large NIDs

Update the logic for generating a fake NID to account for large (IPv6)
NIDs.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY="30a 30b",FORCE_LARGE_NID=true,LOAD_MODULES_REMOTE=true
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: If14f35a55a6774c86dae459bedd37d68999406c4
